    descriptionWe have recieved a distress call from the planet Sinensis here in Mitrillion. Please investigate and rescue any survivors.
    mustBeInorderYes
    minLvl0
    completeDescriptionJohn McClain: ”Ahh… finally. Thank you for helping me good Sir, I’m a John, John McClain, a pioneer in planetary excavations. Yes, I have already filled your ship to the brim with tools needed for this expidition. Haven’t you heard about the new system Fulzar, the legend says its a golden paradise, with planets made of solid gold! But no time for small talk, I have been waiting for this opportunity for years now.
    addedBodies["_qoG5TV-zU-iXfL5Sc8SbQ"]
